mapper.insert: INSERT INTO emission_record (record_date, process_id, material_energy_id, consume_value, emission_factor, emission_value, production_id, input_user_id, audit_status) VALUES (#{recordDate}, #{processId}, #{materialEnergyId}, #{consumeValue}, #{emissionFactor}, #{emissionValue}, #{productionId}, #{inputUserId}, #{auditStatus})
mapper.select: SELECT er.*, p.process_name, me.name as material_energy_name, me.type as material_energy_type, u.real_name as input_user_name FROM emission_record er LEFT JOIN process_info p ON er.process_id = p.id LEFT JOIN material_energy_info me ON er.material_energy_id = me.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON er.input_user_id = u.id WHERE er.id = #{id}

SELECT er.*, p.process_name, me.name as material_energy_name, me.type as material_energy_type, u.real_name as input_user_name FROM emission_record er LEFT JOIN process_info p ON er.process_id = p.id LEFT JOIN material_energy_info me ON er.material_energy_id = me.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON er.input_user_id = u.id ORDER BY er.create_time DESC

SELECT er.*, p.process_name, me.name as material_energy_name, me.type as material_energy_type, u.real_name as input_user_name FROM emission_record er LEFT JOIN process_info p ON er.process_id = p.id LEFT JOIN material_energy_info me ON er.material_energy_id = me.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON er.input_user_id = u.id WHERE er.record_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} ORDER BY er.record_date DESC

SELECT er.*, p.process_name, me.name as material_energy_name, me.type as material_energy_type, u.real_name as input_user_name FROM emission_record er LEFT JOIN process_info p ON er.process_id = p.id LEFT JOIN material_energy_info me ON er.material_energy_id = me.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON er.input_user_id = u.id WHERE er.process_id = #{processId} ORDER BY er.create_time DESC

SELECT p.process_name as processName, SUM(er.emission_value) as totalEmission FROM emission_record er LEFT JOIN process_info p ON er.process_id = p.id WHERE er.record_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY er.process_id, p.process_name ORDER BY totalEmission DESC
